backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing comments and contact messages with add and query functions, including timestamp‑based sorting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence listing implemented updates such as story replacement and contact email change with associated files and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing key frontend components, hooks, styles, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables, light/dark themes, and global background/foreground settings.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Bengali language settings, SEO and Open Graph metadata, and root mount for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main SPA component controlling section navigation and rendering heroes, story content, comments, and contact section with footer icons.
Form and list component for creating and displaying per‑section comments using React Query and UI elements.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact page showing the updated email address and a validated message form with submission state handling.
frontend/src/components/SectionHero.tsx: Hero banner component rendering the floral background and section title, subtitle, and description.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with Bengali labels, mobile menu toggle, and section change handling.
Loads and initializes Google Translate widget for Bengali pages with cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a contact form submit mutation using the backend actor with success state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, loading, login, and identity management via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSectionComments.ts: Fetches and submits comments for specific content sections using backend actor and react-query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with custom OKLCH theme variables, Bengali fonts, and floral background utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entrypoint initializing React, QueryClient, and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, features, and pending requests for story content and contact email updates.
